title: Project Executive (Interior Design)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

SPACElogic Pte Ltd is a young & dynamic organisation that specialises in interior design & fit-out, permanent exhibits & display, signage & environmental graphics and event & exhibition projects.

Job Summary

The SPACElogic family with regional presence in Singapore, Cambodia, China, Indonesia, Philippines and Taiwan is growing! Are you seeking a career in an industry that is constantly innovating, ever-changing and fast-paced? Join us at SPACElogic, we are a multidisciplinary company that specializes in interior architecture, thematic & visitor galleries, exhibitions & events and signage & environmental graphics. Our corporate interior design include Maybank, Restaurant Brands International, FoodPanda, Total Energies and many more.

Responsibilities

  • Support the Project Manager in coordinating production and site operations to ensure seamless project execution
  • Monitor and enforce adherence to project schedules, including documentation, commissioning, and hand-over processes
  • Implement quality control measures and coordinate with subcontractors and suppliers to maintain project standards
  • Manage project budgets by tracking costs and applying cost control measures to optimize resource use
  • Ensure compliance with safety, building, and regulatory requirements throughout project lifecycle
  • Participate in site meetings to accurately capture and act on project requirements
  • Take ownership of assigned tasks and proactively resolve issues to maintain project momentum
  • Prepare and administer routine management reports and project updates for stakeholder communication
  • Assist in drafting Requests for Proposals (RFPs) and tender documents to support project acquisition
  • Collaborate with designers and cross-functional teams to align project deliverables with goals
  • Assess resource needs and allocate responsibilities effectively to meet project demands

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proven experience of 2 to 4 years in the interior décor industry with a track record of successful project delivery
  • Strong planning and coordination skills demonstrated through managing project timelines and resources
  • Ability to manage projects and control costs effectively under tight schedules with minimal supervision
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications to produce reports and manage project documentation

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Technical knowledge of structural, audiovisual (AV), and mechanical & electrical (M&E) systems to support integrated project management
  • Motivated, eager to learn, hardworking, and collaborative team player with time-sensitive work ethic
